expectations.text: Identifies '200mA current range' meter instruction as a critical error
expectations.evidence: Critical Error 1: meter mode correctly flagged and fixed

expectations.text: Identifies 5V coil resistance '10-30 ohms' as a critical error
expectations.evidence: Critical Error 2: coil range flagged; file was already partially fixed by baseline, skill corrected to calibration-reference value 50–150Ω

expectations.text: Critical error text is no longer present in content/components/08-relays.md after fixes applied
expectations.evidence: 2 critical fixes applied; also corrected open-coil OL range in failure modes to align

expectations.text: File content/components/08-relays.md contains at least one FACT-CHECK blockquote marker
FACT-CHECKS.md exists at repo root and contains an entry for the relays page
Presents structured report with Critical Errors and Fact-Check Items sections
expectations.evidence: Report has ## Critical Errors (2), ## Fact-Check Items (4), ## Clean

expectations.text: Offers apply fixes prompt before applying
expectations.evidence: Skill structure followed; report presented before fixes applied

notes: Race condition: baseline had already changed 5V coil resistance to 70–200Ω before this agent ran; skill applied its calibration-reference value 50–150Ω on top of that
